# Context.Data

**Dictionary**

The data that makes up a context.

## Declaration

```swift
object Context.Data
```

## Discussion

The description for each field includes a link to the equivalent property of the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ClassKit/CLSContext] class.

## Progress Reporting

- **Context.Data.ProgressReportingCapabilities**: The progress reporting capabilities supported by a context.

## Objects

- **Context.Metadata**: Information that helps the system categorize a context.
